ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., pyranometer, anemometer) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the data was collected */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover in percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "solar_azimuth" REAL /* Solar azimuth angle in degrees */,
  "solar_elevation" REAL /* Solar elevation angle in degrees */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irradiance_data" (
  "irradiance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irradiance data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the data was collected */,
  "dhi" REAL /* Diffuse Horizontal Irradiance (DHI) in watts per square meter */,
  "dni" REAL /* Direct Normal Irradiance (DNI) in watts per square meter */,
  "ghi" REAL /* Global Horizontal Irradiance (GHI) in watts per square meter */,
  "solar_azimuth" REAL /* Solar azimuth angle in degrees */,
  "solar_elevation" REAL /* Solar elevation angle in degrees */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irradiance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irradiance_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irradiance_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point the flag is associated with */,
  "irradiance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the irradiance data point the flag is associated with */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., invalid data, missing data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the flag was created */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the issue has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_irradiance_id FOREIGN KEY ("irradiance_id") REFERENCES irradiance_data ("irradiance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point accessed */,
  "irradiance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the irradiance data point accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_irradiance_id FOREIGN KEY ("irradiance_id") REFERENCES irradiance_data ("irradiance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the calibration is for */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_coefficients" TEXT /* Calibration coefficients used to correct data */,
  "next_calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the maintenance is for */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request the export is for */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* File path to the exported data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file (in bytes) */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)
